assumptions: The intragroup dividend receivable is a recognised monetary item denominated in a foreign currency.
The question concerns the accounting in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IFRS 9 guidance on eligible hedged items in consolidated financial statements, including the possibility of designating certain intragroup monetary items or forecast intragroup transactions in a hedging relationship.

approaches.label: Foreign currency accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context includes IAS 21 requirements for exchange differences on foreign-currency monetary items and for intragroup monetary balances in consolidated financial statements when hedge accounting is not applied.
